candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview and is the standard total revenue line.
Revenue-related but explicitly non-GAAP, so less preferred.
Also exact top-line sales label; same values as Total Revenue and can serve as alternate over time.

variables.notes: Priority list for reported top-line revenue; prefer GAAP/standard total line over non-GAAP.

candidates.why: Direct production input cost on the income statement; best match for COGS.
Inventory component on the balance sheet, not an expense line, so not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected income statement expense line; excluded balance sheet inventory row.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket and populated; likely includes selling/admin/other external operating costs.
Classic SG&A/overhead component and populated.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Chose the best overhead components and excluded D&A, balancing items, and non-expense metrics.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related but amortization of prior capitalized costs, not current-period R&D expense; exclude for XRD.
Impairment, not current R&D expense; exclude for XRD.
Asset balance, not income statement expense.
Asset gross balance, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear current-period R&D expense line is present on the provided statements. Supplemental amortization/impairment and balance sheet asset rows are not valid XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; best available reported line when pure interest expense is not consistently available.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on leasing liabilities and amortization liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense subcomponent, but only lease-related and incomplete.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct interest expense label; preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific lease interest subcomponent and supplemental; lower priority.
Net interest line, acceptable fallback if more specific interest expense is missing.
Balancing row, not a reported expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list only; prefer direct interest expense, then net interest, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity line exists; here it duplicates parent equity.
Balancing row, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line selected to avoid double counting any non-controlling interests.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present on the provided balance sheet. Since Total Equity equals Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders, MIB is treated as absent.
